_comment: Source of truth for the 7 content pillars (articles-page-overhaul Tier 2.1). Drives (a) the hash-pillar-* internal-tag backfill script, and (b) the hand-authored per-pillar blocks in src/pillar.hbs. NOT read at render time — Ghost themes cannot load arbitrary JSON. `tags` is an ORDERED priority list: the backfill assigns each post to the FIRST pillar whose cluster contains one of the post's topic tags. The legacy software-development cluster (software-development, front-end, web-development, angular, typescript, javascript, css, git, kotlin, spring-boot, react, etc.) is intentionally NOT mapped to any pillar — it stays discoverable via /feeds/dev/ and /blog/ but is off-brand for the PKM pillars.

creator-systems.name: AI & Creator Systems
creator-systems.tagline: Turn AI and automation into real leverage for building and creating.
creator-systems.description: Where knowledge work meets building. How to use AI as a genuine thinking partner, automate the busywork, and turn your systems into an engine for creating products, tools, and a business — without losing the plot.

offer.heading: Want AI to be a real thinking partner, not a gimmick?
offer.productDesc: Make AI write like you — your voice, your context, your standards.

content-systems.name: Content Systems
content-systems.tagline: Publish consistently by turning your notes into a content engine.
content-systems.description: How to create and publish consistently without staring at a blank page. Turn the knowledge you already capture into articles, videos, and products through a repeatable content pipeline.

offer.heading: Want to create content more consistently?
offer.productDesc: Turn your knowledge into publish-ready content, in your own voice.

tools-and-systems.name: Tools & Systems
tools-and-systems.tagline: Build your command center with Obsidian and proven structures.
tools-and-systems.description: The how of knowledge management: choosing tools, setting up Obsidian, and applying proven structures like PARA, Zettelkasten, and atomic notes so your system captures everything without becoming a second job.

offer.heading: Ready to build a system that actually works?
offer.productDesc: Skip weeks of setup — ready-made vault, 40+ templates, proven structure, automation.

writing-and-thinking.name: Writing & Thinking
writing-and-thinking.tagline: Turn raw information into connected insight.
writing-and-thinking.description: The practice layer: how to process information, connect ideas, and think on the page. Writing to think, evergreen notes, and the habits that turn a pile of captures into real understanding.

offer.heading: Want a note-taking practice that compounds?
offer.productDesc: Workshop on journaling, periodic reviews, and reflection routines.

pkm-foundations.name: PKM Foundations
pkm-foundations.tagline: Understand why knowledge management matters — and where to start.
pkm-foundations.description: The foundations of Personal Knowledge Management: why it matters, how it changes the way you learn and create, and the first principles every reliable system is built on. Start here if information overload is winning.

offer.heading: Ready to build your knowledge system?
offer.productDesc: 10+ hours of structured video lessons — from information chaos to a working system.

knowledge-work.name: Knowledge Work
knowledge-work.tagline: Leverage your system at work and in your career.
knowledge-work.description: Applying knowledge management professionally: solving complex problems faster, advancing your career, and leading teams with an organized mind instead of a cluttered one.

offer.heading: Ready to level up your knowledge work?
offer.productDesc: Complete guides and systems for professional knowledge workers.

zen-productivity.name: Zen Productivity
zen-productivity.tagline: Clarity, focus, and habits that stick — without the overwhelm.
zen-productivity.description: Calm, sustainable productivity: the habits, routines, and mindset that keep you focused and balanced. Personal organization and wellbeing for people who want to do more of what matters and less of the rest.

offer.heading: Ready to get properly organized?
offer.productDesc: Clarity, focus, and habits that stick — without the overwhelm.
